description: The Vadalà are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Bova Marina, Reggio Calabria, with alleged interests also in Slovakia. They are active in international drug trafficking, have direct contacts with a Colombian cartel, and practice extortion. The group has been involved in public works corruption and was linked to the murder of Slovak journalist Ján Kuciak.

country_links.evidence_quote: avrebbero contatti diretti con un cartello colombiano
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Vadalà has direct contacts with a Colombian cartel for drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: con presunti interessi anche in Slovacchia
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Vadalà has interests in Slovakia, and its members were arrested there in connection with an investigation.
